name: Agent Mode runtime walkthrough

walkthrough.speaker_note: Start with the phone gateway path, the phone surface owner, and Agent Mode already active.
Show that sponsors are represented as semantic surfaces, not raw BLE streams.
Show an agent CLI session waiting on a bounded approval instead of silently mutating the workspace.
End on the explicit approval gate for a Stripe card hold requested during an AgentPhone booking.

operator_lines: Glasses UI is routed through the Peripheral phone gateway path with phone-owned runtime telemetry.
AgentPhone owns the call, Browser Use owns the page state, Stripe is waiting for approval.
Codex CLI is visible as terminal fallback, but the broker still owns the approval gate.
commands: npm run peripheralctl -- render-json fixtures/ui/agent_mode_sponsor_cards.json --out out/frames/agent-mode-sponsor-cards.png
npm run peripheralctl -- render-json fixtures/ui/agent_mode_cli_status.json --out out/frames/agent-mode-cli-status.png
npm run peripheralctl -- render-json fixtures/ui/agent_mode_approval_gate.json --out out/frames/agent-mode-approval-gate.png
